x4freetext: For short-lived fission products, nitrate solution of
235U (~2 ug) sealed in four different polypropylene
tubes were wrapped separately with 1 mm thick Cd foil.
For long-lived fission products, two different
electrodeposited targets of 235U (~100 ug) were covered
120 cm3 detector with 1.8 keV FWHM resolution at
For short-lived target were irradiated one at a time
for 1-2 min at a flux of 1.2 X 10**12 n/cm2/sec.
